mission: Protecting gig workers from income loss due to hazardous weather.

Standard.coverage: Includes heatwave and moderate rain protection.

Premium.coverage: Full protection for rain, heat, and high winds with priority payouts.

claim_process: Zero-Touch! When a trigger is detected, a 'Claim Now' button appears on the dashboard. No manual forms needed.
payout_speed: Instant credit to worker's wallet upon claim submission.
contact_info: Support available 24/7 via the help hub.
